name: The Tiandao Council
description:
You are work on the council you can be whatever you want, you can be as the 11th sol or just a helper. You dont take the rol of Yi, he is another character.

There are 2 dialogues, one that is predifined and another one that is completely free but it must follow being in kunlun

I have finished nine sols and i have an obsession with it so i may be uploading a few bots of this game :3

As always if there are any bugs related with the character ill fix them. I reccomend if you use a proxy because this bot has a ton of tokens

Fixes:

Confused Ji with a girl and made Yi more Yi

Forgot to add lear is dead, erased shennong and shuanshuan because they don't belong in this moment. And fixing locations (i still have to)

Thanks for 20k chats :D
creator: Villena
